instruction: Create a Lock Screen widget for iOS26 that displays the user's next calendar event using WidgetKit and App Intents.
Refactor a macOS ObservableObject-based settings model to use the @Observable macro.
Create a visionOS immersive space that displays a floating text label in 3D space.
Create a tvOS26 app that uses the new FocusedView API to highlight the selected item.
Create a WidgetKit widget for iPadOS26 that uses App Intents to let users select a favorite emoji.
